scene.message: Maki: {ctl07:1}, I'm feeling{nl} terribly uneasy.{waitkey}{ret}
Maki: ...{wait_fr:41}Chisato, what's{nl} happened to you...{waitkey}{ret}
Mark: When I meet this Queen,{nl} I won't let her off easy!{waitkey}{ret}
Elly: This Queen must be quite{nl} the one for handsome faces.{waitkey}{ret}
Brown: Hmm, that was quite a{nl} mole...{waitkey}{ret}
Ayase: I bet the Queen's got{nl} an afro too... I gotta know~{waitkey}{ret}
Reiji: You want something{nl} from me?{waitkey}{ret}
Reiji: How trivial. I haven't{nl} got time for childish games.{waitkey}{ret}
